crime.value: Murder/assault of Aunt Gloria found in destroyed study with deep chest wound and silver knife
crime.quote: lying on the floor covered in blood, was Aunt Gloria. A deep gash across her chest and a long, silver knife

victim.value: Aunt Gloria - reason for targeting unclear from excerpt
victim.quote: Right in the middle of the room, lying on thew floor covered in blood, was Aunt Gloria.

closed_world.value: Family home and immediate neighborhood - limited suspect pool of family members and acquaintances
closed_world.quote: Go get your stuff and don't come back until we call you.

investigator.value: Tess, the younger sister who discovers the body and experiences events through first-person narration
investigator.quote: I gasped. The room was destoyed... Right in the middle of the room, lying on thew floor covered in blood

red_herring.value: Lucan's betrayal presented as major emotional wound but then dismissed by Christain as unimportant
red_herring.quote: Oh, the one I called a brother before he betrayed me. Well, he did some things I can't even explain.

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence presented to reader: destroyed study, blood, deep gash, silver knife in victim's hand
clue_fairness.quote: A deep gash across her chest and a long, silver knife in her hand.

social_world.value: Family hierarchy with protective older brother, parental authority, and neighborhood commercial establishment
social_world.quote: I have just returned from Romatech Industries,a grocery store in our local neighborhood.

alibi.value: Christain's whereabouts during the murder unclear - he was in the tree, then house, but timeline vague
alibi.quote: He leaped from the branch and landed right where I was standing.

investigator_wound.value: Tess traumatized by discovering bloody corpse of Aunt Gloria, creating emotional vulnerability
investigator_wound.quote: I screamed and screamed until Christain burst into the room.

_meta.title: ebook hunter lynne truth in darkness
